title: Republic Services, Inc. Sets Date for Third Quarter 2023 Earnings Release and Conference Call

title: Republic Services Certified as a Great Place to Work® for Seventh Consecutive Year
text: Only environmental services provider to receive certification PHOENIX , Sept. 11, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- For the seventh consecutive year, Republic Services, Inc. (NYSE: RSG) has been certified as a Great Place to Work ® by the global authority on workplace culture and employee experience.

title: Republic Services: Inherent Resilience And Expected Growth Make This A Buy
text: Republic Services offers a resilient investment opportunity with high barriers to entry and a compelling valuation. RSG operates in an industry that isn't affected by economic conditions, providing stability. The company enjoys strong pricing power, thanks to its landfills ownership.
